series_metadata.series_description: These files contain branch applications that have been approved, denied, or withdrawn, including any related corporate reports and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for five (5) years after date of application, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years after date of application, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
